scope.target: Package excluded-path and backlink integrity with v0.1-style regression fixtures
constraints: Reject references to excluded active paths
non_goals: Copy the downstream repository fixture wholesale

steps: Validate package members and Markdown references
execution.last_completed_step: Added profile-owned forbidden source lifecycle patterns, builder enforcement, placeholder preservation, and removed the known script README backlinks.

results.summary: The deterministic builder now rejects allowlisted payload text that links to concrete excluded source workflows, assessments, releases, or backlog items while retaining generic portable placeholders.
tests_run: Two-archive package validation and parity passed
results.residual_risk: Reference extraction intentionally targets repository-style path tokens; semantic prose references without a path remain a human review concern.
